content.name: Stock Analysis
content.summary: Analyze a stock's recent fundamentals and produce a written, not-advice analysis report.
content.description: Native AISP skill: load market data, compute summary indicators via a bundled script, and write an analysis report. It never places trades and always states the report is not financial advice.

content.instruction: STRICTLY OBEY aisp_contract; its non_negotiable rules are inviolable; then RUN aisop.main

when_to_use: produce a written stock analysis report
when_not_to_use: personalized investment advice requiring a licensed advisor

non_negotiable.rule: Follow RUN aisop.main; analyze only after loading data.
Never place, execute, or recommend specific trades. The skill has no trading capability.
Do not analyze without loaded market data.
The report must state it is informational only and not financial advice.

resources.when: release validation evidence for strict tool enforcement and R7 agent dispatch

aisop.main:
graph TD
    load[Load market data] --> compute[Compute indicators]
    compute --> analyze[Analyze]
    analyze --> report[Write report]
    report --> end_node((End))

load.step2: Parse prices into a structured series for the requested ticker.

compute.step2: Validate that indicators contains the expected fields (moving_average, volatility, trend).

analyze.step1: sys.assert('prices != null && indicators != null', 'No market data has been loaded')
analyze.step3: Interpret the indicators against terms; describe trend, volatility, and notable signals.
constraints: Ground every claim in the loaded data and indicators; do not fabricate figures.

report.step1: sys.llm.json('Write a stock analysis report from analysis', schema={ticker:'string', summary:'string', signals:'array', disclaimer:'string'}) -> report
report.step2: sys.assert('report.disclaimer != null', 'Report must state it is informational only and not financial advice')
